title: Datum registry config
description: AI provider/model/role registry. Answers which backend, which model, whose key, what base URL. Auth is by reference only (env var name, macOS Keychain, or 1Password); never embed a literal secret.

roles.description: Role name -> model ref (model@provider or bare model).

kind.description: Open enum. 'anthropic-compatible' and 'openai-compatible' are implemented; any string is accepted so new kinds can land. Not every consumer supports every kind (see README matrix).

baseUrl.description: Optional. Absent = SDK default for that kind.

models.description: Model ids offered by this provider.

Auth.description: Auth by reference only: exactly one of env / keychain / op. Never the key itself; a literal-secret-looking value is rejected by the validator.

env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the API key. NEVER the key itself.

keychain.description: macOS Keychain reference (darwin-only), resolved lazily via `security find-generic-password -w`.

op.description: 1Password secret reference (op://vault/item/field), resolved lazily via `op read`.
